steps.title: Identify the comparison requirement
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to compare Kipen's theory with Sarris's. The decisive signal is which choice directly contrasts both theorists' core positions on film authorship.

steps.title: Apply the comparison requirement
steps.content:
Choice A accomplishes the goal by directly contrasting Kipen's schreiber theory (screenwriter as primary author) with Sarris's auteur theory (director as primary author).

The others either misrepresent the theorists' positions, compare the wrong pair of theorists, or fail to address both necessary theories.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
